mission.title: istio: Fix VerifyIptablesState ignoring IPv4 state in favor of the IPv6 one
mission.description:
**Please provide a description of this PR:**

When IPv4 was in a clean state requiring new iptables, but IPv6 had a state with compatible residues (n.b.: user-generated rules are considered residues too), the IPv6 result was preferred over the other.
Fixes #56587

resolution.summary: We are facing the same problem and looking forward to the fix
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
